title: Spro Lite
description:
Spro Lite 是 Spro Plus 的简化版，它在优化方面做得更好，但相应的功能会有所减少。

Spro Lite is a streamlined version of Spro Plus, offering better optimization but with a reduced set of features.
body:
# Spro Lite
### zh_cn
- Spro Lite 是基于 Spro Plus,经过优化,减少了非必要模组,增强了其性能和效率。
---
### en_us
- Spro Lite is based on Spro Plus, optimized by reducing unnecessary modules, enhancing its performance and efficiency.
